rows.watchdogRequirement: screen shader display/render watchdog proof is required before final apply; the production apply flow rejects ungated decoration.screen_shader writes and accepts only gated fixture-proven writes with a valid watchdog plan
rows.uiReviewWarning: Display/render sensitive: non-empty values are config-relative shader files compiled as the final screen fragment shader. Path validation is not display/render safety proof; production apply requires the screen-shader high-risk watchdog gate. Compile-aware validation remains deferred. A visible non-production advanced advisory GTK widget exists, and a fixture-selected file action model proves temp-copy execution with generated temp files only. Direct GTK file chooser visual interaction remains deferred; advisory output is explicit-user-triggered, temp-copy-only, non-blocking, non-authoritative, row-specific, and not wired into write safety. The screen-shader track is closed for now; remaining shader-specific gaps are deferred by default.
deferredShaderSpecificWork: direct GTK file chooser visual interaction proof
visible selected-file boundary proof through direct GTK file chooser interaction
cancellation/progress behavior through visible GTK UI
rows.nextRequiredWork: Next high-risk bucket readiness continuation: Display/render blocked rows source evidence inventory sprint selected by the display/render blocked rows readiness batching plan; do not continue decoration.screen_shader work by default unless explicitly approved or required by a proven current safety failure.

screenShaderDisplayRenderReviewFollowUp.policyDecision: Keep current writable behavior temporarily, but require a later dedicated migration sprint to move decoration.screen_shader behind a display/render high-risk gate or otherwise resolve the mismatch.
screenShaderDisplayRenderReviewFollowUp.riskFinding: Non-empty values are config-relative shader files that Hyprland reads and compiles as the final screen fragment shader; path validation alone is not display/render safety proof.
screenShaderDisplayRenderReviewFollowUp.metadataUpdate: Write review projection now shows a display/render-sensitive warning for decoration.screen_shader.
screenShaderDisplayRenderReviewFollowUp.previousRecommendedNextSprint: Screen shader production gate enforcement decision sprint; decide whether to migrate production writes into the proven watchdog gate, keep temporary writable candidate status, or propose block/removal with explicit user approval.
